top_signals.title: Oil Climbs After Fresh Trump Threat as US-Iran Peace Talks Begin
top_signals.summary: Oil rose after President Donald Trump threatened strikes on Iran if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel, raising concerns about progress for peace talks between Washington and Tehran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore Dollar Set to Gain Despite Hawkish Fed, Analysts Say
top_signals.summary: The Singapore dollar is poised to strengthen against the US dollar in the second half of the year despite a hawkish Federal Reserve boosting sentiment toward the greenback, according to strategists.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sorry, Elon, the far right is still the far right
top_signals.summary: And on some issues, it’s further to the right than before
